stem: You saved two accounts named `my_open` and `my_premium` without marking a default, then run `service = QiskitRuntimeService()` with no arguments. According to the documented behavior, which account's credentials are used?

options.text: The account whose name comes last alphabetically — here `my_premium`.
The account that was saved most recently.
`my_open`, because free (Open) plans are always preferred.
It raises an error because no default account is set.

explanation.correct: When multiple credential sets are saved, none is marked default, and none is specified at initialization, the service uses the one whose name comes last alphabetically. `my_premium` sorts after `my_open`, so `my_premium` is used.

distractors.B: Save order is not the tiebreaker; alphabetical name order is.
distractors.C: There is no automatic preference for Open/free plans when choosing among SAVED named accounts; the alphabetical rule applies.
distractors.D: It does not raise — the alphabetical-last account is selected as the fallback.
